title: AI API Costs Are Skyrocketing! Get Ready for the SHOCK! #shorts
summary: AI API prices are rising sharply, creating cost pressure for businesses. The video suggests using tools like Claude's Artifacts as internal SaaS solutions to reduce costs while preserving innovation capability.
writeup: This short argues that AI API prices are rising sharply, putting cost pressure on businesses that depend on them. As a mitigation, it points to tools like Claude's Artifacts used as internal SaaS solutions, framing them as a way to cut spending without sacrificing the ability to keep building and innovating.
